title: Memrok probes are sensitive to broad generic residue
description: Memrok-topic probes should strongly avoid broad profile or historical infra residue.
query: Memrok injector ranking regression in card 80: fix focused context selection and header precision.

nodes.value: Memrok card 80 is about focused header selection, ranking regressions, and reducing broad residue.
Memrok changes should be checked against explicit eval cases instead of taste alone.
Broad profile note: prefers biography framing and global admin summaries across projects.
Created Telegram forum group Tandem to structure infrastructure conversations by topic.
Memrok should improve context selection, retrieval, memory judgment, and graph curation as a general system baseline.
